message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Political Attitudes in West-Berlin 1952","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3063","justification":"Classic early post-war survey focusing on political attitudes of West-Berliners in 1952, including party identification, democracy, and post-war political reconstruction."},{"title":"Political Attitudes in West-Berlin 1954","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3064","justification":"Follow‑up survey on political behaviour and attitudes among West-Berlin residents in 1954, covering party support, electoral participation, and views on democracy."},{"title":"Political Attitudes in West-Berlin 1956","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3065","justification":"Mid‑1950s dataset on political orientations in West-Berlin, including assessments of parties, political interest, and democratic norms."},{"title":"Political Attitudes in West-Berlin 1958","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3066","justification":"Late‑1950s survey capturing changes in political behaviour, party preferences, and attitudes toward the political system in West-Berlin."},{"title":"Political Attitudes in West-Berlin 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3067","justification":"Although at the edge of your time window, this dataset provides continuity with the 1950s series, examining political attitudes and voting behaviour in Berlin at the start of the 1960s."},{"title":"Allensbach Archive, Political Attitudes in Berlin 1951","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3070","justification":"Survey of Berliners’ political opinions shortly after the Berlin Blockade, including party leanings, evaluation of occupation powers, and democratic attitudes."},{"title":"Allensbach Archive, Political Attitudes in Berlin 1953","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3071","justification":"Dataset on political behaviour around the early 1950s federal elections, focusing on voting intentions, party image, and trust in institutions among Berlin residents."},{"title":"Allensbach Archive, Political Attitudes in Berlin 1955","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3072","justification":"Mid‑decade survey dealing with political interest, evaluations of federal and city politics, and attitudes towards German division among Berliners."},{"title":"Allensbach Archive, Political Attitudes in Berlin 1957","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3073","justification":"Pre‑ and post‑election opinion study in Berlin capturing voting behaviour, party identification, and perceptions of major political issues."},{"title":"Allensbach Archive, Political Attitudes in Berlin 1959","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3074","justification":"End‑of‑decade survey documenting political orientations, party support, and democratic attitudes in Berlin just before the 1960s."}]}
